$comment: Draft localization payload pending the upstream JSON localization schema. Keys mirror existing Swift L10n function names (sender) and C tb_tr() call sites (receiver) for easy cross-reference. Placeholders use {name} syntax — translate to ICU / printf / Swift interpolation as needed when wiring into the real runtime. Generated from branch feat/i18n-chinese-ui; safe to discard the Swift/C edits in that branch and reuse only this file.

notes: Sender entries cover all 4 languages because Italian / English / German already existed upstream; only the 'zh-Hans' values are new in this PR.
Receiver entries only carry 'en' + 'zh-Hans' because the C receiver was English-only prior to this branch.
Placeholder convention: {name} (e.g. {ip}, {error}, {width}). For receiver entries derived from printf-style C strings, the 'placeholders' array records the original positional order of %d / %s.

status.waitingDisplayProfile.en: Receiver connected, waiting for display profile…
status.waitingDisplayProfile.zh-Hans: 接收端已连接，等待显示配置…

status.receiverClosedDuringCapture.en: Receiver closed while capture was starting
status.receiverClosedDuringCapture.zh-Hans: 捕获启动时接收端已关闭

status.virtualDisplayCreationFailed.de: Virtuelles Display konnte nicht erstellt werden

status.startingCapture.comment: Italian / English lowercase the source name; German / Chinese keep it as-is. Decide on a uniform casing rule when wiring up.

status.captureStartedWaitingFirstFrame.it: Cattura avviata, attendo il primo frame…
status.captureStartedWaitingFirstFrame.en: Capture started, waiting for the first frame…
status.captureStartedWaitingFirstFrame.de: Aufnahme gestartet, warte auf ersten Bildinhalt…

status.hevcNoFrames.it: 5K avviato ma il path HEVC non sta producendo frame
status.hevcNoFrames.en: 5K started but the HEVC path is not producing frames
status.hevcNoFrames.de: 5K gestartet, aber der HEVC-Pfad erzeugt keine Bildinhalte
status.hevcNoFrames.zh-Hans: 5K 已启动，但 HEVC 通道未输出任何帧

status.noFirstFrame.it: Cattura avviata ma non e' arrivato il primo frame
status.noFirstFrame.en: Capture started but the first frame never arrived
status.noFirstFrame.de: Aufnahme gestartet, aber der erste Bildinhalt ist nie angekommen
status.noFirstFrame.zh-Hans: 捕获已启动，但始终未收到首帧

app.subtitle.it: Crea un display virtuale iMac su macOS e ne invia il contenuto al receiver 5K.
app.subtitle.en: Creates an iMac virtual display on macOS and sends its contents to the 5K receiver.
app.subtitle.de: Erstellt ein virtuelles iMac-Display auf macOS und sendet dessen Inhalt an den 5K-Empfänger.
app.subtitle.zh-Hans: 在 macOS 上创建一个 iMac 虚拟显示器，并将其内容发送到 5K 接收端。

connection.discoveryHint.it: Se selezioni un receiver trovato automaticamente, l'IP viene compilato da solo.
connection.discoveryHint.en: Selecting a discovered receiver fills in the receiver IP automatically.
connection.discoveryHint.de: Wenn du einen gefundenen Empfänger auswählst, wird die Empfänger-IP automatisch eingetragen.
connection.discoveryHint.zh-Hans: 选择已发现的接收端时，接收端 IP 会自动填入。

connection.multiSessionHint.it: Ogni sessione usa un IP Thunderbolt locale dedicato e uno stream indipendente verso il suo iMac.
connection.multiSessionHint.en: Each session uses its own local Thunderbolt IP and an independent stream to its target iMac.
connection.multiSessionHint.de: Jede Sitzung verwendet eine eigene lokale Thunderbolt-IP und einen unabhängigen Stream zu ihrem Ziel-iMac.
connection.multiSessionHint.zh-Hans: 每个会话独占一个本机 Thunderbolt IP，向各自的 iMac 推送独立的码流。

stream.hint1.it: `Duplica Desktop` crea un monitor virtuale e lo mette in mirror col display principale. `Desktop Esteso` crea un monitor virtuale separato visibile nelle impostazioni schermo.
stream.hint1.en: `Duplicate Desktop` creates a virtual monitor and mirrors the main display onto it. `Extended Desktop` creates a separate virtual monitor visible in Display Settings.
stream.hint1.de: `Desktop duplizieren` erstellt ein virtuelles Display und spiegelt den Hauptbildschirm darauf. `Erweiterter Desktop` erstellt ein separates virtuelles Display, das in den Anzeigeeinstellungen sichtbar ist.
stream.hint1.zh-Hans: `镜像桌面` 会创建一个虚拟显示器，并将主屏镜像到上面。`扩展桌面` 会创建一个独立的虚拟显示器，可在「显示器」设置中看到。

stream.hint2.it: `Smooth+` privilegia fluidità. `Crisp` aumenta la nitidezza. `5K` massimizza i pixel.
stream.hint2.en: `Smooth+` prioritizes motion. `Crisp` improves clarity. `5K` maximizes pixels.
stream.hint2.de: `Smooth+` bevorzugt flüssige Bewegung. `Crisp` verbessert die Schärfe. `5K` maximiert die Pixel.
stream.hint2.zh-Hans: `Smooth+` 偏向流畅。`Crisp` 提升清晰度。`5K` 像素最高。

captureSource.desktopMirror.comment: Sender originally had only it/en/de via TBDisplayCaptureSource.title; .chinese added in this branch.

mode.line2.it: Monitor esposto al MacBook: 2560 × 1440 HiDPI @ 60 Hz
mode.line2.en: Display exposed to the MacBook: 2560 × 1440 HiDPI @ 60 Hz
mode.line2.de: Dem MacBook bereitgestelltes Display: 2560 × 1440 HiDPI @ 60 Hz
mode.line2.zh-Hans: 暴露给 MacBook 的显示器：2560 × 1440 HiDPI @ 60 Hz

mode.line3.it: Pipeline: virtual display reale (esteso o mirror) → capture diretta → codec hardware → TCP
mode.line3.en: Pipeline: real virtual display (extended or mirrored) → direct capture → hardware codec → TCP
mode.line3.de: Pipeline: echtes virtuelles Display (erweitert oder gespiegelt) → direkte Aufnahme → Hardware-Codec → TCP
mode.line3.zh-Hans: 流水线：真实虚拟显示器（扩展或镜像）→ 直接捕获 → 硬件编码 → TCP

mode.line4.it: Il receiver va in fullscreen solo quando arriva il primo frame.
mode.line4.en: The receiver switches to fullscreen only when the first frame arrives.
mode.line4.de: Der Empfänger schaltet erst auf Vollbild um, wenn der erste Bildinhalt ankommt.
mode.line4.zh-Hans: 接收端仅在收到首帧后才会切换到全屏。

mode.line5.it: Scegli la sorgente, poi bilancia fluidità e nitidezza col profilo stream.
mode.line5.en: Choose the source, then balance motion and clarity with the stream profile.
mode.line5.de: Quelle wählen, dann Bewegungsfluss und Schärfe mit dem Stream-Profil abstimmen.
mode.line5.zh-Hans: 先选择来源，再用码流配置在流畅度与清晰度之间取舍。

multiSession.summary.connected.comment: Note: zh-Hans deliberately reorders 'total' before 'active' for natural Chinese phrasing.
multiSession.summary.connected.zh-Hans: {total} 个会话中已连接 {active} 个

permissions.missingScreenRecording.it: TargetBridge non ha il permesso Registrazione Schermo. Verifica Privacy e Sicurezza > Registrazione Schermo.
permissions.missingScreenRecording.en: TargetBridge does not have Screen Recording permission. Check Privacy & Security > Screen Recording.
permissions.missingScreenRecording.de: TargetBridge hat keine Berechtigung für die Bildschirmaufnahme. Überprüfen Sie Systemeinstellungen > Datenschutz & Sicherheit > Bildschirmaufnahme.
permissions.missingScreenRecording.zh-Hans: TargetBridge 没有「屏幕录制」权限。请前往「隐私与安全性 → 屏幕录制」检查。

permissions.screenCaptureKitPermissionMi.it: ScreenCaptureKit ha fallito anche se il permesso Registrazione Schermo risulta concesso. Dettagli: {details}
permissions.screenCaptureKitPermissionMi.en: ScreenCaptureKit failed even though Screen Recording permission appears granted. Details: {details}
permissions.screenCaptureKitPermissionMi.de: ScreenCaptureKit fehlgeschlagen, obwohl die Berechtigung zur Bildschirmaufnahme erteilt zu sein scheint. Details: {details}
permissions.screenCaptureKitPermissionMi.zh-Hans: 屏幕录制权限看起来已授予，但 ScreenCaptureKit 仍然失败。详情：{details}

settings.title.comment: These 'settings.*' keys are new in this PR (gear-button Settings sheet). Discard them if the upstream UI refactor obsoletes the sheet.

receiver.$comment: Receiver was English-only before this branch; only 'en' + 'zh-Hans' provided. Italian / German / etc. can be derived from the sender wording when the JSON system is wired up.

banner.subtitle.zh-Hans: 5K / HiDPI 接收端，等待发送端连接

banner.footer.line1.en: Start the sender on your MacBook and enter this IP address.
banner.footer.line1.zh-Hans: 在 MacBook 上启动发送端，并填入上方的 IP 地址。

banner.footer.line2.en: When the first frame arrives, the receiver switches to fullscreen automatically.
banner.footer.line2.zh-Hans: 收到第一帧画面后，接收端会自动切换到全屏。

banner.footer.line3.en: If the sender stops, the receiver returns here ready for a new session.
banner.footer.line3.zh-Hans: 发送端停止后，接收端会返回此界面，等待下一次会话。

status.modeReceiving.comment: Original C printf: '%d x %d px receiving' (width, height).

status.connectedProfileSent.zh-Hans: 发送端已连接，已发送配置

status.sessionAccepted.zh-Hans: 会话已接受，等待画面帧

status.requested.full.comment: Original C printf: '%d x %d px requested (%s, %s, %s)'.
